name: pq-verifiable-archive
description: Post-quantum document anchoring for AI agents. Anchor any SHA-256 hash to Algorand mainnet with ML-DSA-65 (NIST FIPS-204) signatures. Verify offline decades later without trusting any vendor.

tools.name: anchor_document
tools.description: Anchor a SHA-256 document hash to Algorand mainnet with post-quantum ML-DSA-65 attestation. Returns a self-contained proof bundle verifiable offline without trusting any vendor.

parameters.hash: 64-character lowercase hex SHA-256 hash of the document
parameters.envelope_id: (optional) identifier for the document or envelope
parameters.signers: (optional) array of {name, email, signedAt} signer records

tools.name: verify_bundle
tools.description: Run all 5 post-quantum verification checks on a proof bundle: ML-DSA-65 signature, PDF hash match, Merkle inclusion, Algorand anchor, and Falcon-512 state proof coverage.

parameters.bundle: JSON proof bundle returned by anchor_document
parameters.pdf_base64: (optional) base64-encoded PDF to verify document hash

env.ALGORAND_MNEMONIC: 25-word Algorand mnemonic for the signing wallet
env.DOCUSIGN_MLDSA_PUBLIC_KEY: hex-encoded ML-DSA-65 public key (from npm run register-key)
env.DOCUSIGN_KEY_REGISTRATION_TXN_ID: Algorand txn ID from npm run register-key

hostedApi.payment: x402 — $0.01 USDC per anchor on Algorand mainnet
